description: In 2011, Netflix announced a price hike and the separation of DVD and streaming services into 'Qwikster', causing significant customer backlash. The company eventually reversed the Qwikster decision but maintained the price increase, marking a pivotal shift in consumer sentiment toward digital-first models.

key_events.description: Announcement of the Qwikster brand and price split.
Viral social media backlash and massive subscriber loss.
Reed Hastings issues a public apology and cancels Qwikster.
Stabilization of subscriber base with new pricing model.

calibration_notes: Measures the impact of aggressive corporate pivots on brand loyalty and consumer trust.
